# Delta9 - Complete Documentation

> Strategic AI Coordination for Mission-Critical Development

Delta9 is an OpenCode plugin implementing a hierarchical Commander + Council + Operators architecture that separates planning from execution, maintains mission state across context compactions, and verifies all work against acceptance criteria.

---

## Quick Start

### Installation
```bash
# Add to opencode.json
{ "plugin": ["delta9"] }

# Or install globally
npm install -g delta9
```

### Usage
```bash
opencode
> "Build a user authentication system"
# Delta9 automatically:
# 1. Detects complexity
# 2. Convenes Council
# 3. Creates mission plan
# 4. Executes with verification
```

---

## Architecture

### Agent Layers (19 Agents)

**Command Layer (1)**
- Commander (Opus 4.5): Lead planner, never writes code

**Council Layer (4 Oracles)**
- Cipher (Opus 4.5): Architecture specialist
- Vector (GPT 5.2): Code patterns
- Prism (Gemini 3 Pro): UI/UX specialist
- Apex (DeepSeek v3): Performance

**Execution Layer (2)**
- Operator (Sonnet 4): Task executor
- Validator (Haiku 4.5): QA verification

**Delta Team (8 Support Agents)**
- RECON (Haiku): Codebase reconnaissance
- SIGINT (Sonnet 4.5): Intelligence research
- TACCOM (GPT 4o): Tactical command advisor
- SURGEON (Haiku): Surgical precision fixer
- SENTINEL (Sonnet 4.5): Quality assurance guardian
- SCRIBE (Gemini Flash): Documentation writer
- FACADE (Gemini Flash): Frontend operations
- SPECTRE (Gemini Flash): Visual intelligence

### Council Modes

| Mode | Oracles | Trigger |
|------|---------|---------|
| NONE | Commander only | Simple tasks |
| QUICK | 1 Oracle | Moderate tasks |
| STANDARD | All configured | Complex tasks |
| XHIGH | All + recon | Critical tasks |

### Mission State

Files in `.delta9/`:
- `mission.json`: Current mission (source of truth)
- `mission.md`: Human-readable view
- `history.jsonl`: Audit log
- `checkpoints/`: Rollback points

---

## Project Structure

```
delta9/
├── src/
│   ├── index.ts              # Plugin entry
│   ├── agents/               # 19 agent definitions
│   │   ├── commander.ts      # Lead planner
│   │   ├── operator.ts       # Task executor
│   │   ├── validator.ts      # QA verification
│   │   ├── council/          # 4 Oracles (Cipher, Vector, Prism, Apex)
│   │   └── support/          # 8 Delta Team agents
│   ├── mission/              # State management
│   │   ├── state.ts
│   │   ├── schema.ts
│   │   └── markdown.ts
│   ├── orchestration/        # Council orchestration
│   ├── routing/              # Task routing
│   ├── hooks/                # Event handlers
│   ├── tools/                # 56 custom tools
│   ├── lib/                  # Utilities
│   └── types/                # TypeScript types
├── docs/
│   ├── spec.md               # Full specification
│   ├── README.md             # Navigation hub
│   ├── delta9/               # Architecture docs
│   ├── opencode/             # OpenCode reference
│   ├── plugin-guide/         # 14-file development guide
│   ├── patterns/             # Best practices
│   └── reference-code/       # 41 plugin examples (gitignored)
└── package.json
```

---

## Delta Team Config Keys

| Codename | Config Key | Role |
|----------|------------|------|
| RECON | `scout` | Codebase reconnaissance |
| SIGINT | `intel` | Intelligence research |
| TACCOM | `strategist` | Tactical advisor |
| SURGEON | `patcher` | Precision fixes |
| SENTINEL | `qa` | Quality assurance |
| SCRIBE | `scribe` | Documentation |
| FACADE | `uiOps` | Frontend ops |
| SPECTRE | `optics` | Visual analysis |

---

## Key Concepts

### Protected Commander Context
Commander never writes code, preventing context pollution from implementation details.

### External Mission State
`mission.json` persists on disk, surviving context compaction.

### Validation Gate
Dedicated Validator agent verifies all work before task completion.

### Heterogeneous Council
Multiple AI models deliberate for diverse perspectives.

### Graceful Degradation
Works with any model combination user has access to.

---

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/delta9 mission "description"` | Start new mission |
| `/delta9 mission --council=xhigh` | Force XHIGH mode |
| `/delta9 deploy` | Begin/resume execution |
| `/delta9 sitrep` | Show status |
| `/delta9 pause` | Pause mission |
| `/delta9 abort` | Cancel mission |
| `/delta9 rollback [checkpoint]` | Rollback |
| `/delta9 council` | Show council config |
| `/delta9 budget` | Show budget |

---

## Configuration

```json
{
  "commander": {
    "model": "anthropic/claude-opus-4-5",
    "temperature": 0.7
  },
  "council": {
    "enabled": true,
    "defaultMode": "standard",
    "members": [
      { "name": "Cipher", "model": "anthropic/claude-opus-4-5", "enabled": true },
      { "name": "Vector", "model": "openai/gpt-5.2-codex", "enabled": true },
      { "name": "Prism", "model": "google/gemini-3-pro", "enabled": true },
      { "name": "Apex", "model": "deepseek/v3", "enabled": true }
    ]
  },
  "operators": {
    "default_model": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929"
  },
  "support": {
    "scout": { "enabled": true, "timeoutSeconds": 30 },
    "intel": { "enabled": true, "timeoutSeconds": 60 },
    "strategist": { "enabled": true, "timeoutSeconds": 45 },
    "patcher": { "enabled": true, "timeoutSeconds": 30 },
    "qa": { "enabled": true, "timeoutSeconds": 90 },
    "scribe": { "enabled": true, "timeoutSeconds": 60 },
    "uiOps": { "enabled": true, "timeoutSeconds": 60 },
    "optics": { "enabled": true, "timeoutSeconds": 45 }
  },
  "budget": {
    "limit": 10.0,
    "warnAt": 0.7
  }
}
```

---

## Development

### Setup
```bash
npm install
npm run build
ln -s $(pwd) ~/.config/opencode/plugins/delta9
```

### Commands
```bash
npm run build      # Build TypeScript
npm run test       # Run 651 tests
npm run lint       # Check code style
npm run dev        # Watch mode
npm run typecheck  # TypeScript strict check
```

### Code Style
- TypeScript strict mode
- Zod for validation
- camelCase functions
- PascalCase types
- kebab-case files

---

## Boundaries

### Always Do
- Read spec.md before changes
- Validate with Zod
- Use OpenCode patterns
- Test before commit

### Ask First
- Modifying mission schema
- Adding agent types
- Changing Commander logic

### Never Do
- Use `any` type
- Mutate state directly
- Skip Validator gate
- Hardcode models

---

## OpenCode Reference Documentation

Complete OpenCode plugin development guide at `docs/opencode/`:

| File | Content |
|------|---------|
| 00_OVERVIEW.md | OpenCode fundamentals |
| 01_PLUGIN_SYSTEM.md | Plugin architecture, lifecycle, hooks |
| 02_AGENTS.md | Agent definitions (JSON & markdown) |
| 03_TOOLS.md | Built-in and custom tools |
| 04_HOOKS.md | Event hooks reference |
| 05_MCP.md | Model Context Protocol servers |
| 06_CONFIG.md | Configuration options |
| 07_SKILLS.md | Skills system (Anthropic spec) |
| 08_MODELS.md | 75+ model providers |
| 09_ECOSYSTEM.md | Plugin ecosystem, tools, community |

---

## Advanced Patterns (21 Patterns)

Production-tested patterns at `docs/patterns/`:

**Core Orchestration (1-6):**
1. Background Agent System - Concurrent task execution
2. Dynamic Agent Prompt Builder - Runtime prompt generation
3. Category + Skills Delegation - Model routing with expertise
4. Boulder State - Persistent plan tracking
5. Hook Composition Pattern - Modular event handling
6. Session State Management - Subagent tracking

**Agent Patterns (7-12):**
7. Sisyphus Orchestrator Prompt - Phase-based workflow
8. Oracle Consultation - Read-only advisory agent
9. Skills System - Domain expertise loading
10. Configuration Schema - Zod-based validation
11. Toast/Notification Manager - Progress tracking
12. Resume Pattern - Session continuity

**Tool Integration (13-16):**
13. LSP Tool Integration - Code intelligence
14. AST-Grep Transformation - Structural code changes
15. Phase Reminder Hook - Instruction injection
16. Plugin Composition - Merging multiple plugins

**Utilities (17-21):**
17. Command Loader - Markdown-based commands
18. Notification Plugin - Desktop alerts
19. Inspector Plugin - Debugging web UI
20. Skills with MCP - Dynamic MCP integration
21. Streamlined Orchestrator - Token-efficient design

---
